# Plumb Me

Plumb Me is a local plumbing business based in New York, serving the surrounding community with plumbing solutions. The brand name has a playful, memorable twist that gives it a friendly and approachable personality, setting it apart from more generic plumbing companies.

Source: https://plumb-me-58c0d304.zappy5.app

---

# NY plumbing help, without the runaround.


### Plumb Me brings fast, friendly plumbing solutions to homes, rentals, and businesses across New York.


Book a Visit
See Services















## Pick your plumbing line.


Straightforward service routes for everyday plumbing problems.













### Leak Stop


Expert residential plumbing services for pipe leaks, fixture drips, and unexpected bursts. We keep your water where it belongs.












### Drain Clear


Roto rooter plumbing near me? We clear clogged sinks, tubs, and main lines fast. Say goodbye to slow drains.












### Water Heater Check


Hot water issues? We handle maintenance, repairs, and replacement guidance. Expert services plumbing heating air & electrical.


























## Built for New York speed and neighborly service.


From co-op apartments to brownstones and storefronts, Plumb Me keeps the process simple. Our residential plumbing services are designed for the rhythm of the city, ensuring fast response and clear communication every time.

### Clear explanations before work begins

## Real help that feels human.


Every call is answered by a real person who listens — not a robot. Here's what your neighbors are saying about our residential plumbing services.

Description: Explore Plumb Me&#39;s full range of home services: plumbing, heating, air &amp; electrical solutions. Quality workmanship and upfront pricing. See how we can help!

Expert Services Plumbing, Heating, Air & Electrical — Plumb Me

# Plumbing services mapped clearly.


From annoying drips to urgent drain backups, Plumb Me helps New York residents, property teams, and local businesses solve plumbing issues with less stress.




Leak Stop



Drain Clear



Fixture Fix



Hot Water



Preventive Check
















## Our Residential Plumbing Services


Fast, reliable solutions for every pipe, drain, and fixture in your home. Our expert services cover everything from emergency leaks to full bathroom renovations.











### Leaks and Pipe Repairs


From dripping faucets to burst pipes, we diagnose and fix leaks fast. Our team uses advanced leak detection to find hidden water damage before it spreads, saving you money on costly repairs.










### Clogged Drains


Slow sinks, backed-up showers, or foul odors? We clear blockages in kitchen, bathroom, and main sewer lines using hydro-jetting and professional augers that get the job done right the first time.










### Toilet and Faucet Repairs


Running toilets, wobbly handles, or low water pressure? We repair and replace all major brands of faucets and toilets, restoring comfort and efficiency to the most-used fixtures in your home.










### Water Heater Support


No hot water in the morning? We install, repair, and maintain traditional tank and tankless water heaters so you always have reliable hot water when you need it most.










### Kitchen and Bath Plumbing


Planning a renovation or dealing with an outdated setup? We handle sink installations, garbage disposals, shower valves, and full fixture upgrades with precision and care.










### Maintenance for Properties


Keep your plumbing in top shape with regular inspections and preventative maintenance. We serve homeowners and property managers across New York, helping you avoid emergencies before they start.





Schedule a Service Visit








## How a service visit flows.





01

### Tell us what is happening


Reach out by phone or our quick online form. Describe the issue — a drip, a clog, or an emergency — and we'll listen carefully so we arrive prepared with the right tools and parts for your residential plumbing services.






02

### We confirm the best next step


Our team reviews your situation and confirms a convenient appointment window. We'll explain what to expect, provide a transparent estimate, and answer any questions before we even head your way.






03

### A technician assesses the issue


A licensed Plumb Me technician arrives on time, inspects the problem thoroughly, and walks you through the findings. Using advanced diagnostic tools, we pinpoint the root cause before any work begins.






04

### You get a clear repair path


We present a straightforward, no-surprises repair plan with upfront pricing. Once you approve, we complete the work efficiently, clean up thoroughly, and leave your home better than we found it.

Plumb Me supports homeowners, new buyers, landlords, small businesses, and property management teams across the surrounding community with reliable residential plumbing services.

## Meet Your Trusted Roto Rooter Plumbing Near Me Team — Plumb Me

URL: https://plumb-me-58c0d304.zappy5.app/about
Description: Discover the Plumb Me difference: a local New York team built on trust, skill, and a playful spirit. Learn why neighbors choose us for all their plumbing needs.

Meet Your Trusted Roto Rooter Plumbing Near Me Team — Plumb Me






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Services
- About
- Contact



Contact















OUR STORY


# A local plumbing team with a name you remember.


Plumb Me was created to feel different from the typical plumbing company: approachable, direct, and easy to call when something goes wrong. We believe that great residential plumbing services should come with a friendly face and a name that sticks — because when your pipes burst at midnight, you need someone you can trust without a second thought.


Rooted in New York, we treat every service call like a neighborhood connection. From leaky faucets to full repipes, our team brings the same energy and expertise that makes Plumb Me the go-to choice for homeowners who want quality work without the corporate runaround.


Get to know us


























## Our Core Values


The principles that guide every job — from a simple leak to a full system overhaul.












### Speak Clearly


No jargon, no upselling, no confusion. We explain exactly what's happening in your home, what needs to be done, and why — so you can make informed decisions without the guesswork. Our team is trained to prioritize transparent communication, ensuring you understand every step of the process before we even pick up a wrench.












### Respect the Space


Your home is not a construction site — it's your sanctuary. We treat it that way. Our plumbers wear shoe covers, use protective mats, and clean up thoroughly after every job. We believe tidy work habits are a sign of respect, and we leave your space as clean as we found it — if not cleaner.












### Solve What Matters


We don't just fix symptoms — we diagnose the real problem. Our realistic recommendations focus on long-term reliability and genuine value, not quick patches. Whether it's a minor repair or a major installation, we deliver solutions that stand the test of time, so you can trust your plumbing for years to come.























## Friendly pros, practical fixes.


Every Plumb Me technician is trained in courteous communication and local service awareness. We live and work right here in New York, so we understand the urgency of a backed-up brownstone drain or a burst pipe in a pre-war walk-up. When you call, you get a real person who listens — and a pro who shows up ready to solve the problem.













### Mike Torres


Service technician











### Elena Vasquez


Drain specialist











### David Chen


Customer support coordinator





















## What customers can expect.









### Clear communication


We explain the issue, the solution, and the cost in plain language before any work begins. No jargon, no surprises — just honest, upfront residential plumbing services you can trust.









### Practical options


From quick fixes to long-term upgrades, we lay out every viable path so you can choose what fits your home and budget. Expert services plumbing heating air & electrical, tailored to your needs.









### Respectful arrival


We treat your home like our own. Our team arrives on time, in uniform, with shoe covers and a friendly attitude — ready to solve your problem without disrupting your day.









### Clean completion


We don't leave a mess behind. Every job finishes with a thorough cleanup, so the only sign we were there is a working system. That's the Plumb Me standard for every service call.











## Need a plumber who keeps it simple?


Reach out to Plumb Me and describe the issue. Whether you're searching for residential plumbing services or need expert help fast, we make it easy to get the right plumber on the way.


Start a Conversation
























Fast, reliable plumbing that keeps your city flowing — day or night.

# Tell Plumb Me what is going on.


For leaks, clogs, fixture trouble, hot water issues, or property plumbing questions, send a message and the team will help with the next step.












### Call for urgent plumbing needs


If water is where it shouldn't be, skip the form. Call us directly for immediate residential plumbing services.
















### Send details for follow-up


Describe your plumbing situation and we'll get back with a plan. Ideal for non-emergency repairs, estimates, and questions.


Message Us















## Let's Get It Flowing


Share the issue, location context, and any timing concerns.




Name



Email



Phone



Message





I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  and  Privacy Policy



Send Message















[business_address]



[business_phone]



[business_email]














## Helpful details to include.







STATION 1


### Where is the issue?


Describe the room, fixture, or appliance that's causing trouble. Is it the kitchen sink, basement drain, or upstairs bathroom? The more specific you are, the faster we can diagnose the problem and bring the right tools.







STATION 2


### What changed recently?


Did the problem start after a storm, a renovation, or new appliance installation? Any recent changes help us trace the root cause. Even small details like unusual noises or slow drains can point us in the right direction.







STATION 3


### Is water actively running?


If water is flowing right now, tell us immediately. Know where your main shut-off valve is located. If you can safely turn it off, do so. This information helps us prioritize your call and give you emergency guidance over the phone.











## Serving the surrounding New York community.


Plumb Me works with local homeowners, new homebuyers, small businesses, and property management firms looking for clear plumbing support.






Homeowners & Homebuyers

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://plumb-me-58c0d304.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Home
- Services
- About
- Contact



Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  7/2/2026



Plumb Me ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Plumb Me

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://plumb-me-58c0d304.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- Services
- About
- Contact



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  July 2, 2026



Plumb Me is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Plumb Me

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions































- Home
- Services
- About
- Contact



Contact








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  July 2, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Plumb Me

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Home Services / Plumbing provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Plumb Me provides Home Services / Plumbing through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Plumb Me. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Plumb Me

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
